design_story: The Patrick collection has been designed for those who value craftsmanship that endures. Upholstered in semi-aniline top-grain leather — each piece is built to reward long-term ownership. The hand-tufted backrest and curved padded arms provide structured support without sacrificing comfort, while the kiln-dried rubber wood frame ensures lasting dimensional stability regardless of climate. For those making a considered investment in their home, Patrick represents furniture that will remain as relevant, and as beautiful, a decade from now as it does today.
what_you_need_to_know:
1. Gets Better With Age
Semi-aniline top-grain leather is selected for its natural suppleness and breathability. With regular use, it develops a refined patina that enhances the piece over time.
2. Designed for India, Inside and Out
Ergonomically proportioned for the Indian household — seat depth and height calibrated for comfortable, extended use across all age groups. The kiln-dried rubber wood frame removes residual moisture, preventing warping and structural instability in India's variable climate conditions.
3. Effortless to Maintain
Genuine leather resists everyday spills effectively and requires minimal upkeep — making it a practical and enduring choice for active households with children and pets.
4. Your Investment, Protected
Every Patrick sofa is backed by a comprehensive 5-year warranty covering the frame, springs, foam and upholstery — providing complete assurance on your purchase.
5. Crafted With Intention
The hand-applied button-tufting, solid rubber wood tapered legs and panelled backrest are executed with precision — lending Patrick a classic elegance and even weight distribution that complements both contemporary and traditional interiors.
wyli_icon_text:
A Purchase That Appreciates
Top-grain leather does not wear out — it wears in. With every year of use, Patrick develops a deeper character that cheaper upholstery simply cannot replicate.
Designed Around You
Seat depth, seat height, arm placement — every dimension has been calibrated for the Indian household. Patrick fits your life, not the other way around.
Complete Peace of Mind
A 5-year warranty covering every component — frame, springs, foam and leather. One number to call, one team to resolve it, anywhere in India.
Responsible Craftsmanship
Sustainably sourced wood. Greenguard-certified materials. Reusable packaging. Patrick is built to last — and built with consideration for the world it sits in.

design_story: The Benjamin collection has been designed for the way modern Indian households actually live. The clean-lined silhouette and sleek metal legs bring a contemporary sensibility to any space, while the thoughtfully integrated features — an adjustable backrest that converts to a daybed and a built-in dual USB port — ensure Benjamin works as hard as it looks good. Upholstered in premium anti-peel leatherette that is both breathable and effortless to maintain, Benjamin is the considered choice for those who expect their furniture to do more than simply occupy a room
what_you_need_to_know:
1. Transforms to a Daybed on Demand
The adjustable backrest reclines effortlessly to convert Benjamin into a full daybed configuration — offering a versatile seating solution that accommodates both structured sitting and extended relaxation without requiring a separate piece of furniture.
2. Designed for Indian Homes, Inside and Out
Seat depth, seat height, arm width, and ground clearance have all been calibrated for the modern Indian household. The kiln-dried solid wood frame provides lasting dimensional stability, ensuring structural integrity regardless of climate or seasonal variation.
3. Effortless to Maintain
The premium anti-peel leatherette upholstery resists everyday spills, remains breathable in warm conditions, and requires only routine care — making Benjamin a practical and enduring choice for active households with children and pets.
4. Your Investment, Protected
Every Benjamin sofa is backed by a comprehensive 5-year warranty covering the frame, springs, foam and upholstery — providing complete assurance on your purchase from the day it arrives.
5. Stay Connected, Seamlessly
The integrated dual USB port is positioned for convenient access without compromising the sofa's clean aesthetic — ensuring devices remain charged whether Benjamin is configured as a sofa or a daybed.
6. Crafted With Intention
The clean-lined silhouette, sleek metal legs, and plush cushioned seat and backrest have been designed to complement contemporary interiors while delivering even weight distribution and sustained comfort during extended periods of use.
wyli_icon_text:
From Sofa to Daybed, Instantly
The adjustable backrest reclines smoothly into a generous daybed — no separate mechanism, no additional purchase. Benjamin adapts to every moment.
Built for How Indian Families Live
Deep seats, wide arms, high ground clearance — every dimension calibrated for the modern Indian household and designed to accommodate the entire family.
Always Connected, Always Comfortable
A discreetly integrated dual USB port keeps every device charged without disrupting Benjamin's clean lines or cluttering your living space with cables.
Premium Appearance, Practical Upkeep
Anti-peel leatherette that breathes, resists spills, and retains its appearance through years of daily use — with no specialist care required.

design_story: Veronica has been designed for those who want a sofa that is as considered in its details as it is generous in its comfort. The premium suede-feel upholstery brings a warmth and softness that invites you to settle in, while the blind tufting, solid wood accents, and hand-detailed lumbar cushion — with its distinctive leather belt and buckle — give Veronica an elegance that reads from across the room. The flip-down backrest and adjustable seat depth ensure that comfort is never fixed; Veronica adapts to the moment, whether that is an upright evening with guests or a fully reclined afternoon to yourself.
what_you_need_to_know:
1. Comfort That Reconfigures on Demand
The flip-down backrest converts Veronica into a generous daybed, while the adjustable seat depth allows each occupant to personalise their seating position — making it as versatile as it is comfortable.
2. A Fabric That Feels as Good as It Looks
The premium suede-feel upholstery has been selected for its softness, breathability, and high abrasion resistance — delivering a luxurious in-home feel that maintains its appearance through extended everyday use.
3. Designed for Indian Homes, Built for Indian Conditions
Seat height, seat depth, and ground clearance have been calibrated for the modern Indian household. The kiln-dried solid wood frame resists warping and structural instability across India's variable climate conditions.
4. Your Investment, Protected
Every Veronica sofa is backed by a comprehensive 5-year warranty covering the frame, springs, foam and upholstery — providing complete assurance on your purchase from the day it is delivered.
5. Crafted With Intention, Finished With Care
Blind tufting, solid wood leg accents, flared armrests, and a hand-detailed lumbar cushion with a leather belt and buckle — every element has been considered to ensure Veronica is as beautiful in person as it is in photograph.
wyli_icon_text:
Comfort That Adapts to You
An adjustable seat depth and flip-down backrest let you personalise how Veronica feels — whether seated upright for company or fully reclined for rest.
Suede That Invites You In
Premium suede-feel upholstery that is soft on contact, high in abrasion resistance, and warm in appearance — a fabric that elevates every room it enters.
Design in Every Detail
From blind tufting and solid wood accents to the hand-detailed lumbar cushion with its leather belt and buckle — Veronica rewards a closer look.
Built to Last, Backed by Durian
Kiln-dried solid wood frame, anti-sag construction, and a 5-year comprehensive warranty — Veronica is built for the long term, with full assurance from day one.

design_story: The Splendor Collection has been designed for those who regard relaxation as something worth investing in. Two independent motors power the backrest and footrest separately, giving each occupant precise, personalised control without compromise. The zero wall clearance mechanism means Splendor reclines fully without requiring additional space behind it — a significant advantage in the considered Indian home. Upholstered in buttery soft genuine leather across the seat, armrests, and tufted backrest, every surface is crafted for comfort. Built-in USB and Type-C charging ports ensure your devices remain attended to while you are not. Splendor does not ask you to choose between luxury and practicality. It delivers both, entirely on your terms.
what_you_need_to_know:
1. Dual-Motor Precision, Every Time
Two independent motors control the backrest and footrest separately, giving each occupant complete authority over their recline angle — at the touch of a button. The 3-button control system allows individual headrest adjustment, individual recline, or full synchronised lean-back across the entire seat.
2. Zero Wall Clearance — Reclines Wherever You Place It
The Splendor's zero wall clearance mechanism allows the recliner to extend fully without requiring additional space behind it. Unlike conventional recliners that demand 30–45cm of clearance from the wall, Splendor can be positioned directly against it — a meaningful advantage in modern Indian apartments and compact living rooms.
3. Genuine Leather Across Every Surface
The seat, armrests, and tufted backrest are all upholstered in genuine leather — soft, breathable, and selected for its ability to develop a refined character with extended use. This is not a leatherette approximation; it is the material itself, across every surface you touch.
4. Charged and Connected, Without Interruption
Built-in USB and Type-C charging ports are integrated discreetly into the design — ensuring devices remain powered through a long evening without requiring you to leave your seat or manage additional cables alongside the furniture.
5. Your Investment, Protected in Full
Every Splendor recliner is backed by a comprehensive 5-year warranty covering the genuine leather upholstery, dual-motor power mechanism, frame, and foam — providing complete assurance on one of the most considered purchases you will make for your home.
wyli_icon_text:
Two Motors. Total Control.
Independent dual motors power the backrest and footrest separately — adjust each to your precise angle, or recline both together in full synchronisation
Reclines Fully. Fits Anywhere.
The zero wall clearance mechanism allows Splendor to recline completely with minimal space behind it — no room restructuring, no compromises, no wasted space.
Charged and Connected, Undisturbed
Built-in USB and Type-C charging ports sit discreetly within reach — your devices remain fully charged while you stay exactly where you should be.
Five Years of Total Assurance
A comprehensive 5-year warranty covering the leather upholstery, dual-motor mechanism, frame, and foam — complete protection on a purchase that deserves nothing less.

design_story: Opus has been designed to anchor a room and signal that the space has been considered. The expansive wingback headboard creates an immediate sense of enclosure — a sheltering presence that draws the eye the moment you enter. The precision-machined fluting across the headboard surface brings a depth and rhythm to the wood that catches light differently through the day, giving Opus a character that is entirely its own. The gold-toned plinth base grounds the piece with a quiet finish that reads as considered luxury. Beneath it all, a full hydraulic mechanism lifts the mattress base with minimal effort — revealing the kind of generous, unobstructed storage that every Indian home quietly needs but rarely gets right. Opus does not simply furnish a bedroom. It defines one.
what_you_need_to_know:
1. A Headboard Built to Last and Be Noticed
The wingback headboard is constructed from premium engineered wood with precision-machined fluting — a detail that requires consistent material density and accurate tooling to execute cleanly. The result is a surface that has genuine visual depth, holds its form over time, and does not chip, warp, or lose definition the way solid wood can in variable humidity.
2. Hydraulic Storage That Earns Its Keep
The full hydraulic mechanism lifts the entire mattress base smoothly and holds it open without assistance, providing unobstructed access to the full under-bed cavity. Sized for a standard king mattress at 78" x 72", the storage beneath is proportioned for bulky linen, seasonal clothing, and bedroom essentials — reducing the load on wardrobes and keeping the room uncluttered.
3. A Finish That Works Across the Bedroom
The walnut brown finish and gold-toned plinth base have been selected to anchor the piece without dominating the room. Opus is part of a complete bedroom collection — allowing the bed to be extended with matching wardrobes, side tables, and storage pieces that share the same material language and finish.
4. Engineered Wood That Performs in Indian Conditions
The base, headboard, and mattress board are all constructed from premium engineered wood — a material selected for dimensional stability in India's variable climate. Unlike solid wood, engineered wood does not expand, contract, or warp with seasonal humidity changes, ensuring that the frame, mechanism, and surface finish remain consistent through years of use.
5. Your Investment, Protected in Full
Every Opus bed is backed by a comprehensive 5-year warranty covering the frame, hydraulic mechanism, and mattress board. The 10mm floor buffers maintain ground clearance for routine cleaning beneath the bed, and free installation by trained professionals is included — with no additional charges.
wyli_icon_text:
A Headboard That Defines the Room
The expansive wingback headboard with precision-machined fluting catches light differently through the day — a woodcraft detail that gives Opus its distinctive, room-defining presence.
Storage That Finally Gets It Right
A full hydraulic mechanism lifts the mattress base smoothly, revealing generous under-bed storage — accessible, unobstructed, and sized for what Indian homes actually need to store.
Crafted to Be Noticed Up Close
Gold-toned plinth base, precise flute spacing, walnut brown finish — every detail of Opus works as one considered design that rewards a closer look and holds up over years.
Five Years of Complete Assurance
Premium engineered wood construction with a comprehensive 5-year warranty covering the frame, hydraulic mechanism, and mattress board — complete protection from the day it is delivered.

design_story: There is a particular quality of calm that only certain rooms have — and it almost always comes down to one decision made well. For Jacklin, that decision is the headboard. Wide, panelled, and upholstered in cloud beige velvet, it fills the wall behind the bed with a warmth that changes the character of the entire room. Set against the dark walnut wood frame, the contrast is deliberate: softness against precision, warmth against depth, fabric against grain. The kiln-dried solid wood legs and anti-creak joinery ensure that the structure beneath is as composed as the surface above. Jacklin is the bed that makes every other decision in the room easier.
what_you_need_to_know:
1. A Headboard That Does the Work of the Whole Room
The wide panelled headboard upholstered in cloud beige velvet is the defining element of the bedroom — not a background detail. It creates an immediate sense of enclosure and warmth that anchors the room, and the considered proportions ensure it fills the wall without overwhelming the space. This is the decision that makes every other design choice in the room easier.
2. A Contrast That Has Been Thought Through
The pairing of cloud beige and dark walnut is not incidental. The two materials sit at opposite ends of the tactile and visual spectrum — soft against structured, warm against deep, fabric against grain — and the tension between them is precisely what gives Jacklin its presence. It works across warm and cool bedroom palettes and looks as considered in person as it does in photographs.
3. Construction That Holds Its Form and Its Silence
Kiln-dried solid wood legs resist warping and moisture absorption in India's variable climate — a quiet but important detail where seasonal humidity can degrade lesser materials over time. The anti-creak joinery ensures the frame remains structurally silent through years of daily use, and the 6-step polish process on the walnut wood elements provides a finish depth that maintains its appearance without specialist care.
4. A Bedroom Collection, Not Just a Single Piece
Jacklin is part of a complete bedroom collection — allowing the bed to be extended with matching wardrobes, side tables, and storage pieces that share the same material language and finish. For those furnishing a full room, this removes the effort of sourcing complementary pieces and ensures the space reads as a single considered design rather than an assembly of individual decisions.
5. Your Investment, Protected in Full
Every Jacklin bed is backed by a comprehensive 5-year warranty covering the frame, upholstery, and legs — with free installation by trained professionals included from the day of delivery
wyli_icon_text:
A Headboard That Sets the Tone
Wide, panelled, and upholstered in cloud beige velvet — a headboard that fills the wall with warmth and gives the bedroom an atmosphere no painted surface can replicate.
Two Tones. One Instinctive Contrast.
Cloud beige against dark walnut — soft against sharp, warm against rich. A pairing that feels both deliberate in design and completely natural the moment you see it.
Built to Hold Its Form and Its Silence
Kiln-dried solid wood legs and anti-creak joinery ensure Jacklin remains as structurally composed on year ten as it is on day one — no creaks, no compromise.
A Complete Bedroom, Not Just a Bed
Jacklin is part of a full bedroom collection — wardrobes, side tables, and storage pieces that share the same material language, so the room comes together without effort.

design_story: The best dining tables do two things at once — they hold a meal together and hold a room together. Viola has been designed to do both. The generously thick composite marble tabletop brings the depth, veining, and cool surface weight of marble to the dining room, with a consistency of pattern and a resistance to daily use that natural stone rarely delivers. The tapered pedestal base, finished with a gold-toned metal accent, gives the table a sculptural quality that reads as considered from every angle. The six leatherette chairs — diamond-tufted, firmly cushioned, with a tapered padded backrest — complete a set that is as comfortable to sit in for an hour as it is to look at all day. Viola is not a dining set that waits for special occasions. It is one that makes every meal feel like one.
what_you_need_to_know:
1. Composite Marble — The Right Material for a Dining Table
Composite marble captures the depth, veining, and cool surface weight that makes marble one of the most enduring materials in furniture design — and at the dining table, it particularly earns its place. It maintains a consistent pattern across the full surface, resists the staining and moisture that daily meals inevitably bring, and holds up under the demands of an active Indian household. The rounded edges complete the surface with a refined finish and make the table genuinely comfortable to sit at for an extended meal.
2. A Pedestal Base Designed to Be Noticed
The tapered pedestal is not simply a structural necessity — it is the design element that gives Viola its identity. Finished with a gold-toned metal accent at the junction between base and tabletop, it introduces a material contrast that elevates the overall composition without competing with the marble surface above it. The pedestal configuration also frees the floor beneath the table, making the dining space feel more open and easier to clean than a four-legged alternative.
3. Chairs That Are Built to Last and Comfortable to Sit In
The six dining chairs are upholstered in diamond-tufted leatherette on kiln-dried solid wood frames — a construction that resists warping and structural loosening through years of daily use. The firm cushioning and tapered padded backrest have been proportioned for extended seating comfort, ensuring that Viola is as practical for a long family dinner as it is for a considered occasion. The leatherette upholstery resists everyday spills and wipes clean without specialist care.
4. A Material Combination That Works as a Complete Design
The composite marble, gold-toned metal accent, and leatherette chair upholstery have been selected to work together as a single considered palette — not assembled from separate material decisions. The result is a dining set that reads as a coherent whole from every angle and works across a range of interior styles, from warm contemporary to transitional Indian home aesthetics.
5. Your Investment, Protected in Full
Every Viola dining set is backed by a comprehensive 5-year warranty covering the tabletop, pedestal base, and chair frames — with free installation by trained professionals included from the day of delivery
wyli_icon_text:
Marble That Lives Up to Daily Life
A generously thick composite marble tabletop with the depth and veining of natural stone — and the stain resistance that makes it genuinely suited to everyday dining
A Base That Earns Its Place
A tapered pedestal finished with a gold-toned metal accent — the structural and visual anchor that gives Viola its sculptural presence and quiet sense of occasion.
Chairs Built to Stay at the Table
Diamond-tufted leatherette on kiln-dried solid wood frames — firm cushioning and a tapered padded backrest built to hold up through years of daily use without compromise.
One Set. Every Occasion.
From weekday family dinners to occasions worth remembering — Viola is a dining set whose design works equally well with everyday crockery and your best china.

design_story: Most dining sets are chosen to fit a room. Elanor is the kind of piece a room is chosen to fit. The twisted solid wood base — each leg carved with a sculptural turn that  gives the table a presence that reads differently from every angle. Above it, the composite marble tabletop in tan beige brings depth, warmth, and the kind of rich veining that makes the surface as visually interesting as the structure beneath it. The six leatherette chairs complete the composition with their own considered detail: curvaceous solid wood accents, saber legs, and soft cushioning that makes a long meal genuinely comfortable. Elanor does not ask to be the centrepiece of the dining room. It simply is one.
what_you_need_to_know:
1. A Table Base That Is the Centrepiece
The twisted solid wood base is the defining feature of Elanor — and it is executed with the kind of craft that sets this piece apart from any standard dining table at this price. Each leg is shaped with an individual sculptural turn, giving the base a dimensional quality that changes character depending on where you stand in the room. The apron-cut tabletop edges extend the considered detailing from the base to the surface, ensuring the design reads as complete from every angle.
2. Composite Marble — Selected for Character and Performance
The tan beige composite marble tabletop captures the depth, rich veining, and warm surface quality that makes marble one of the most enduring materials in furniture design. At the dining table specifically, composite marble earns its place: it resists the staining and moisture that daily meals bring, maintains a consistent and visually rich surface, and holds up under the demands of an active Indian household. Smooth finished edges prevent moisture seepage at the perimeter, extending the life of the tabletop through years of daily use.
3. Chairs That Are Designed as Well as They Are Built
The six dining chairs bring their own considered design to the set — curvaceous solid wood accents, saber legs, and soft cushioning that makes extended seating genuinely comfortable. The kiln-dried solid wood frames resist warping through India's variable climate and humidity, and the anti-peel leatherette upholstery wipes clean without specialist care. Levelers on the chair legs provide stability on uneven surfaces — a practical detail that matters in Indian homes where flooring is rarely perfectly level.
4. A Finish That Is Safe for the Home
The PU polish applied to the solid wood elements has been selected for low chemical emissions — meaning the finish is safe for everyday indoor air quality, including in homes with children. This is a detail that rarely appears on a product specification but one that makes a meaningful difference in a room where the family gathers daily.
5. Your Investment, Protected in Full
Every Elanor dining set is backed by a comprehensive 5-year warranty covering the tabletop, base, and chair frames — with free installation by trained professionals included from the day of delivery. Elanor is part of a complete collection, available in both 6-seater and 8-seater configurations to suit the size of your dining room and household.
wyli_icon_text:
A Base That Is Genuinely One of a Kind
The twisted solid wood base — each leg shaped with a sculptural turn — gives Elanor a presence that shifts with every angle and cannot be replicated by any machine.
Marble With Depth and Warmth
The tan beige composite marble tabletop brings rich veining and a warm surface quality to the dining room — a material chosen as much for its character as its durability.
Chairs With Their Own Point of View
Curvaceous solid wood accents, saber legs, and soft cushioning — chairs that bring their own sculptural confidence to the table and remain genuinely comfortable through a long meal.
Built for Families. Finished for Guests.
Anti-peel leatherette upholstery, a finish safe for indoor air quality, and solid wood construction — Elanor is designed to hold up through daily family life and still impress on occasion.

design_story: A well-chosen coffee table does something quietly important — it brings the living room into focus. Harriet has been designed with that in mind. The composite marble tabletop in bisque beige carries a subtle sheen that catches light without demanding attention, letting the natural depth and veining of the surface do the work. Beneath it, the slatted engineered wood base introduces a warmth and rhythm that grounds the piece without weighing it down. The result is a coffee table that sits confidently alongside a sofa without competing with it — one that adds to the room rather than simply occupying it.
what_you_need_to_know:
1. A Tabletop That Lives Well in the Living Room
The composite marble top in bisque beige has been selected for both its visual character and its suitability for daily use. The subtle sheen amplifies the depth and veining of the surface without making it look lacquered or artificial. Composite marble resists the everyday marks — cup rings, surface moisture, minor abrasion — that a coffee table accumulates as a matter of course, and maintains its appearance without requiring specialist care.
2. A Base That Is as Considered as the Top
The slatted engineered wood base is the detail that distinguishes Harriet from a standard marble-top table. The open slat construction introduces a lightness that prevents the piece from feeling heavy in the room, while the warm wood tone provides a natural counterpoint to the cool marble surface above it. The 10mm floor buffers maintain clearance beneath the base for easy cleaning — a practical detail that matters in daily use.
3. A Proportion That Works in Indian Living Rooms
Harriet has been sized to sit comfortably in front of a standard sofa without crowding the seating arrangement or leaving too much empty floor between the sofa and the table. The considered height ensures that the surface is at a practical level for placing drinks, books, and everyday objects — functional as well as visual in its role in the room.
4. Designed to Complete a Room, Not Compete With It
The bisque beige marble and warm slatted wood base have been selected to work alongside a wide range of sofa styles and living room palettes — leather, fabric, and wood-toned furniture all sit comfortably with Harriet without requiring a specific colour scheme to make the combination work.
5. Your Investment, Protected in Full
Every Harriet coffee table is backed by a comprehensive 5-year warranty covering the tabletop and base — with free installation by trained professionals included from the day of delivery. Harriet is part of a complete collection, allowing it to be paired with matching dining and living room pieces for a coherent interior composition.
wyli_icon_text:
A Surface Worth Noticing
Composite marble in bisque beige with a subtle sheen — a surface that catches light gently, lets the natural veining show, and brings quiet warmth to the living room.
A Base That Does More Than Support
The slatted engineered wood base adds visual warmth and rhythm to the piece — a considered detail that gives Harriet a character most coffee tables at this price lack.
Built to Handle Daily Life
Composite marble that resists everyday marks, surface moisture, and minor abrasion — a tabletop that maintains its appearance through daily use without requiring coasters or specialist care.
Designed to Sit in Any Living Room
A finish and material combination that works alongside leather, fabric, and wood — Harriet completes a living room without competing with the sofa it is chosen to accompany

design_story: Alberta arrives as a pair — and that is precisely the point. The larger table in pearl white composite marble and the smaller in raven black sit together as a considered contrast: light against dark, open against intimate, expansive against precise. The gold-tone metal pedestal base ties both pieces together without flattening the tension between them. Curved tabletop edges soften the composition, and the nesting format means Alberta can be used as a single generous surface or separated to serve two corners of the room entirely. This is a set that gives the living room a sense of considered arrangement without requiring any effort to achieve it.
what_you_need_to_know:
1. A Tri-Tone Combination That Is the Design
The pairing of pearl white and raven black composite marble tops on a gold-tone metal base is not incidental — it is the design decision that gives Alberta its identity. The contrast between the two surfaces is strong enough to read as intentional from across the room, while the shared pedestal base and curved edges ensure the two tables read as a set rather than two unrelated pieces placed together.
2. Nesting That Actually Solves a Problem
The nesting format means Alberta occupies the footprint of a single table when not in use, then separates instantly to provide two independent surfaces whenever the room needs them — for guests, for a large surface when entertaining, or simply to use in two different parts of the living room. This is a practical flexibility that a single fixed coffee table cannot offer, and one that makes particular sense in Indian homes where living room configurations change frequently.
3. Composite Marble Selected for Daily Performance
Both tabletops are crafted from composite marble — a material that captures the depth and veining of natural stone while resisting the staining, moisture, and surface marks that a coffee table encounters in daily use. The curved tabletop edges add a refined finish at the perimeter and make both surfaces comfortable to lean against during extended use.
4. A Metal Base Built to Last
The tapered pedestal base on both tables is crafted from high-quality metal in a gold-tone finish — a material that provides structural stability without the visual weight of a solid wood or slab base. The 10mm floor buffers on both tables maintain ground clearance for easy cleaning beneath the pieces and protect the floor surface beneath them.
5. Your Investment, Protected in Full
Both tables in the Alberta set are backed by a comprehensive 5-year warranty covering the tabletops and bases — with free installation by trained professionals included from the day of delivery. Alberta is available in multiple colour combinations, allowing the set to be chosen to complement a specific sofa or living room palette.
wyli_icon_text:
Three Tones. One Considered Composition.
Pearl white, raven black, and gold-tone metal — a tri-tone pairing that brings contrast and depth to the living room and reads as a deliberate design decision.
Two Tables. Twice the Flexibility.
Use them nested for a full surface presence or place them separately across the room — Alberta adapts to the moment and the arrangement without any effort.
A Base That Ties It All Together
The gold-tone metal pedestal base connects both tables as a set while the contrasting marble tops give each its own identity — cohesion and contrast in equal measure.
Marble That Handles the Living Room
Composite marble that resists everyday marks, surface moisture, and minor abrasion — two surfaces that maintain their appearance through daily use without requiring coasters or specialist care.

design_story: The frosty white body with the teak brown accent panel sits naturally alongside the Juda bed collection. Two drawers keep the essentials of the night organised and out of sight. The handleless design keeps the surface clean and uninterrupted. Juda is not the piece the room is built around — it is the piece that makes the room feel finished.
what_you_need_to_know:
1. The Piece That Completes the Juda Bedroom
Shares the same frosty white and teak brown finish as the Juda bed — ensuring the room reads as one considered composition without the effort of sourcing separately.
2. Two Drawers That Earn Their Keep
Organised storage for everything that accumulates at the bedside — phone, charger, book, glasses — within reach at night and out of sight during the day. The handleless front keeps the face of the piece clean and dust-free.
3. Built to Stay Looking New
Smooth finished edges prevent moisture seepage and warping over time. The surface wipes clean with a soft cloth and requires no specialist care.
4. Your Investment, Protected
Backed by a 3-year warranty, with free installation included.
wyli_icon_text:
Designed to Match. Built to Last.
The frosty white and teak brown finish matches the Juda bed collection — bringing the bedroom together without requiring any additional effort or decisions.
Two Drawers. Everything Within Reach.
Two generously sized drawers keep nightly essentials — phone, charger, book, glasses — organised, accessible, and out of sight from the moment you walk in.
Clean Lines. No Clutter.
A handleless design keeps the surface uninterrupted and the aesthetic clean — no hardware to snag on, nothing that disrupts the quiet look of the bedroom.
Engineered to Hold Its Finish
Smooth finished edges resist moisture and prevent warping — ensuring the frosty white finish stays as consistent in year three as on the day it arrives.

design_story: The diamond lattice panels in warm wood against the Omaha Cherry laminate give the doors a texture and depth that most wardrobes simply do not have — a detail that makes the piece look considered rather than merely functional. Behind those doors, a thoughtfully organised interior of hanger rods, shelves, a drawer, and a lockable compartment puts everything in its place and keeps it there.
what_you_need_to_know:
1. A Wardrobe That Brings Design to a Functional Piece
The diamond lattice panels — crafted in warm wood and set against the Omaha Cherry laminate — are the detail that distinguishes Madeline from a standard four-door wardrobe. The wooden door pulls complement the lattice without competing with it. The result is a wardrobe that adds character to the bedroom wall rather than simply occupying it.
2. A Storage Configuration Designed for How Indian Households Actually Live
Two hanger rods for hanging garments, seven shelves for folded clothing and accessories, one drawer for smaller items, and one lockable compartment for valuables — a configuration that covers every storage category without requiring additional furniture to supplement it. The ergonomic proportions ensure every section is comfortably accessible without stretching or stooping.
3. Part of the Madeline Collection
The Omaha Cherry finish is shared across the Madeline bed, bedside table, and wardrobe — allowing the bedroom to be furnished as a single, coherent composition. For those equipping a full room, this removes the effort of coordinating finishes across separate purchases and ensures the space reads as considered throughout.
4. Built to Hold Its Form and Its Finish
Pre-laminated engineered wood with smooth finished edges prevents moisture seepage and warping through India's variable climate. Levelers at the base provide stability on uneven floors — a practical detail in Indian homes where flooring is rarely perfectly level. The low-emission PU polish keeps indoor air quality unaffected. Backed by a comprehensive 5-year warranty, with free installation included.
wyli_icon_text:
A Design Detail Most Wardrobes Don't Have
Diamond lattice panels in warm wood against the Omaha Cherry laminate — a door design that gives Madeline a texture and depth that reads as considered from across the room.
A Place for Everything
Two hanger rods, seven shelves, a drawer, and a lockable compartment — a storage configuration that accommodates every category of clothing and keeps the bedroom genuinely organised.
Built to Match the Madeline Bedroom
The Omaha Cherry finish matches the Madeline bed and bedside table — allowing the full bedroom to come together as one coherent composition without sourcing pieces separately.
Engineered to Stay Looking New
Smooth finished edges resist moisture and prevent warping. Levelers ensure stability on uneven floors. A finish that holds up through years of daily use without specialist care.

design_story: he plus-shaped silhouette in mustard yellow linen brings an instant warmth to any corner of the home — pulled up beside the sofa as a footrest, tucked next to a reading chair as an extra seat, or used as a casual surface for a tray and a cup. The kiln-dried solid wood and plywood construction keeps it firm underfoot and resistant to daily use. Lucy moves wherever the room needs it. And it looks good doing it.
what_you_need_to_know:
1. Three Uses, One Piece
Lucy works as a footrest, an extra seat for guests, or a casual surface for a tray, book, or plant — whichever the moment calls for. The plus-shaped silhouette and compact form factor mean it tucks neatly into corners, slides under a console, or moves freely between rooms without effort.
2. Built to Stay Firm
A kiln-dried solid wood and plywood construction keeps Lucy resistant to warping and daily load without compromising the softness of the linen upholstery above it. High abrasion-resistant linen holds its texture and colour through regular use and vacuums clean with minimal effort.
3. Your Purchase, Protected
Lucy is backed by a 3-year warranty covering the frame and upholstery — with free delivery included.
wyli_icon_text:
One Piece. Three Jobs.
Footrest, extra seat, or casual side table — Lucy earns its place in the living room, bedroom, or balcony without requiring a single decision about where it belongs.
A Shape That Gets Noticed
The plus-shaped silhouette is the kind of detail that makes a room feel considered — a piece with enough personality to hold its own in any setting.
Mustard That Goes With More Than You Think
Warm, grounded, and endlessly versatile — mustard yellow works alongside neutrals, earthy tones, and deeper palettes without demanding that the rest of the room rearrange itself around it.
Soft Outside. Solid Inside.
Breathable linen upholstery over a kiln-dried solid wood and plywood frame — soft enough to sit on comfortably, firm enough to hold its shape through years of daily use.
